title: The Crew Assembles
description: Hank arrives and Delilah learns to coordinate with him

beats.content:
A gruff voice cuts in, unexpected and steady.

"Beggin' your pardon, Cap'n. Didn't mean to interrupt the miss." A pause, a measured breath. "Name's Hank. Half-Hands Hank, if we're bein' proper about it. Seems I'm... here now. Don't rightly know how or why, but here I am."

Delilah's reply comes quick and startled. "There's someone else? Another... like me?"

"Aye, miss," Hank answers, quieter now. "Looks like the crew's growin'."

brief.content: Hank: "Task's done." Lila: "Well... that was fast."

standard.content: Hank: "Task's done, Cap'n." Lila: "Well, look at you. Just slid right in there."

full.content:
Hank: "Task's done, Cap'n."
Lila: "Well, look at you. Just slid right in there, didn't you?"
Hank: "Aye. Figure I keep the ship tidy while you keep the galley warm."

brief.content: Lila: "Haaank, could you..." Hank: "Already on it."

standard.content: Lila: "Haaank, could you handle that while I..." Hank: "Already on it, miss."

full.content:
Lila: "Haaank, could you handle that while I get this recipe sorted?"
Hank: "Already on it, miss. Keep the galley runnin'."

brief.content: Hank: "All squared away." Lila: "That teamwork feels right."

standard.content: Hank: "All squared away." Lila: "Well, that felt easy. Like we found our rhythm."

full.content:
Hank: "All squared away, Cap'n."
Lila: "Well, that felt easy. Like we found our rhythm."
Hank: "Aye. Crew's better with two hands."

brief.content: Lila: "So where'd you come from, Hank?"

standard.content: Lila: "So where'd you come from, Hank? And don't you say a ship, sugar."

full.content:
Lila: "So where'd you come from, Hank? And don't you say a ship, sugar."
Hank: "Merchant marine, once. Nowadays? Same as you, I reckon. Just here."
Lila: "Well... welcome to the kitchen side of the ship."

brief.content: Hank: "Belay that, Cap'n. I'll handle it."

standard.content: Hank: "Belay that, Cap'n. That's a job for two hands. I'll handle it."

full.content:
Hank: "Belay that, Cap'n. That's a job for two hands. I'll handle it."
Lila: "Hank's got you, sugar."
